dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal identifies 'tall candles' as outperforming 'short candles'. Translated 'tall candle height' as candlestick range exceeding ATR_14 (volatility-adjusted measure). Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT (both long and short applicable). Hold period set to 3 days based on best performance data (candleend+3days: 1.28% bull, 0.63% bear). Exit conditions derived from AUTHOR_SILENT guidance using mean reversion to SMA_10. Stop loss set to worst-case 10-day bear scenario (-3.46%). Entry applies to both bull and bear regimes as stated in target regimes.

source_rule_text: Candlestick pattern: Tall candles outperform short candles. Measure candlestick height from lowest low to highest high price.
